title: ZXSpace Leaderboards
description: Understand known ZXSpace leaderboard surfaces, including Highest Score and shared ZX Series Total Score progression.
summary: ZXSpace leaderboard planning focuses on score consistency and shared ZX Series progression surfaces.

sections.heading: Known leaderboards
paragraphs: Current documentation identifies Highest Score as the ZXSpace app-specific leaderboard.
ZXSpace also participates in shared ZX Series Total Score through the shared Retro leaderboard model.

sections.heading: How to improve
paragraphs: For Highest Score, prioritize survival, wave completion, and efficient alien clearing.
UFO targets and higher-value alien rows help score, but protecting the city and shields keeps a run alive long enough to matter.
